scripts.build: npm run build --workspace packages/contracts && npm run build --workspace apps/web && npm run build --workspace apps/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace packages/contracts && npm run lint --workspace apps/web && npm run lint --workspace apps/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace packages/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/web && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/api
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace packages/contracts && npm run test --workspace apps/web && npm run test --workspace apps/api
